title: Non-record: Diffusion-Noised Teacher AR Hybrid (val_bpb=1.2734, 8xH100)
author: anthony-maio

data.description: Diffusion-inspired denoising auxiliary loss during training by corrupting input prefix tokens and interpolating clean and noisy autoregressive losses.
Tied input embeddings and output embeddings.
Uses grouped query attention with fewer KV heads than attention heads.

novel_contributions: Diffusion-inspired auxiliary denoising loss added to standard autoregressive training
Corrupts prefix tokens with masking and random replacement while preserving standard validation
Noise ratio ramps from 5% to 35% over training
Interpolates clean and noisy losses with a fixed auxiliary weight
Demonstrates a portable smoke-test implementation without changing tokenizer, dataset, or evaluation metric
